layout_components.name: Header
layout_components.description: Sticky navigation, backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#040914]/80, elegant logo on left, 3-5 nav links centered, 'Contact Us' button on right. Use lucide Crown icon and 'Goldner & Dias Paes' text for logo.

layout_components.name: Hero Section
layout_components.description: Full-width background image with text overlay. Use 'luxury_hero_bg' as bg-image. bg-black/40 overlay for contrast. Left or Center aligned content. Overline: 'EXCELLENCE IN LEGAL ADVOCACY'. H1: 'Goldner & Dias Paes Advocacia'. Primary CTA button.

layout_components.name: Value Proposition
layout_components.description: 3 columns. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3. Very clean, generous spacing. Icons in gold (#D4AF37). Short titles like 'Unparalleled Expertise', 'Strategic Vision', 'Discreet Representation'.

layout_components.name: About / Authority Split Layout
layout_components.description: Grid md:grid-cols-2. Left side: Text focused, large heading, elegant paragraph, gold accent line. Right side: 'luxury_office_interior' image, max-h-[80vh] object-cover rounded-sm.

layout_components.name: Services Grid
layout_components.description: 6 cards grid. Glassmorphism cards (bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-sm) with 1px border-white/10. Hover: border-[#D4AF37]/50 and subtle translate-y. Minimalist lucide icons.

layout_components.name: Differentiation
layout_components.description: Can be integrated below or near About section. 3-4 bullet points using Lucide CheckCircle in Gold, large text, stacked vertically with good spacing.

layout_components.name: Founder-Partner Profile
layout_components.description: Single profile. Flex row or grid. Image: Professional lawyer portrait. Clean, minimal text.

layout_components.name: Office Locations
layout_components.description: Pretty component showing 3 locations (e.g., São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, Brasília). 3 cards with images at the top, location details below.

layout_components.name: CTA Section
layout_components.description: Dark background with 'dark_navy_gold_texture'. Centered text. Prominent Gold 'Contact Us' button. No forms.

layout_components.name: Footer
layout_components.description: Clean footer, dark background, social media links (Lucide icons), copyright text.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons should scale slightly or change background brightness. Cards should have border transitions and slight lift (-translate-y-1).

testing.instructions: All interactive elements, buttons, nav links, and cards MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g. data-testid='contact-us-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind classes. Do not use random external CSS files for layout.
Implement 'Playfair Display' and 'Outfit' fonts via Google Fonts in index.html or global CSS.
Ensure the hero text has proper contrast against the background image. Use drop-shadow or a gradient overlay if necessary.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Only 'Playfair Display' for Headings and 'Outfit' for Body.
Use Lucide-React for all icons. Ensure they are sized appropriately.
Apply all media URLs exactly as provided in this file.

Logo: Since the user provided a logo description ('gold/navy crest design with crown'), create a text-based logo using the Lucide 'Crown' icon in gold (#D4AF37) next to 'Goldner & Dias Paes' text in Playfair Display.
Implement the 'Contact Us' button as a prominent, solid gold (#D4AF37) button with black text. Do not include a form.
